# BookBase — Pre-Submission Quick Checklist

**🚨 CRITICAL — Must Complete Before Submission:**

## Developer Info Replacement (AboutView.swift)
- [ ] Replace `"BookBase Developer"` with **real full name**
- [ ] Replace `"iOS Engineer"` with **actual role**
- [ ] Replace bio text with **real 2–3 sentences**
- [ ] Replace `https://github.com` with **real GitHub URL**
- [ ] Replace `https://linkedin.com` with **real LinkedIn URL**
- [ ] Replace `mailto:dev@bookbase.app` with **real email**

## Developer Photo
- [ ] Create `developer_photo` imageset in `Assets.xcassets`
- [ ] Add **square photo (min 110×110pt)** to the imageset

## Xcode Verification
- [ ] Delete root-level `BookBase/ContentView.swift` (if present)
- [ ] Clean build: `⌘⇧K`
- [ ] Build: `⌘B` → **zero errors**
- [ ] Run on iPhone 15 Pro simulator → **zero crashes**

## Submission Package
- [ ] Test all features (search, favorites, share, navigation, haptic)
- [ ] Select `BookBase` folder in Finder
- [ ] Right-click → Compress → `BookBase.zip` (single file, not nested)
- [ ] Add Figma link to Dicoding Notes (Section 5 of QA Report)

**Status:** ✅ Ready for QA submission after developer actions complete.
